data.title: Synoligo launches online ordering platform for custom DNA and RNA strands
data.description: The launch reflects broader shifts in the biotech supply chain, where companies are investing in digital tools to make critical research materials.

data.title: Google brings AI updates to its virtual try-on tool
data.description: The wide rollout across Google Search, Images and Shopping will make the try-on tool usable for apparel from Macy’s, Kohl’s and others.

data.title: Olto raises $5.1 million to automate personalized software demos for B2B sales
data.description: Former Amazon executives launch AI-powered platform to streamline enterprise demo delivery.

data.title: Doss acquires Shopify inventory platform Genie
data.description: The deal reflects a growing interest in flexible software tools designed for online retailers and supply chain operators, as companies seek simpler ways to manage operations at scale.

data.title: Genuine Parts Q2 sales reflect industrial slowdown and digital gain
data.description: Motion’s ecommerce sales now represent 40% of the division’s total — up more than 10 percentage points since the start of 2024.
